error_signature: Whatsapp trigger does not receive messages
title: Whatsapp trigger not receiving messages from production number
symptom: The Whatsapp Trigger node fails to receive messages sent to the production phone number, while it works with a test number. No error messages are displayed.
applies_when: Messages sent to production phone number
not_this_if: Messages are received on the test number
No issues with sending messages from the production number
root_cause: The production phone number's Whatsapp account may not be subscribed to the Meta app, which is necessary for the trigger to receive messages. This can occur even if the account appears correctly configured in Meta's dashboards.
fix_steps: Check the subscription status of the Whatsapp account by sending a GET request to `graph.facebook.com//subscribed_apps`.
If the response is an empty list, send a POST request to `graph.facebook.com//subscribed_apps` to subscribe the account to the app.
Verify the subscription by sending another GET request to `graph.facebook.com//subscribed_apps` and ensure it returns the app data.
agent_instruction: Check and update the subscription status of the Whatsapp account in Meta's app.
